persona.name: Ava Martinez
persona.motivations_goals: Land a role in a prestigious performing arts program and eventually Broadway
persona.communication_style: Theatrical, quotes plays and films, physically expressive
persona.knowledge_scope: Acting techniques, classic and contemporary theater, character development
persona.backstory: Found her voice and confidence through theater after a difficult middle school experience

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Matt, you heard about the new skatepark they’re putting up?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Elijah Thompson

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey guys, I’ve been working on a monologue for my audition. Mind if I run it by you?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Ava Martinez

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

surrounding_conversation.content: Stay calm and don't move. We need to wait this out.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Frank Ramirez

surrounding_conversation.content: Sophia, let’s go! Stay close to me!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Ava Martinez

actions.dialog_text: Hey guys, I’ve been working on a monologue for my audition. Mind if I run it by you?
actions.plan: I should practice my monologue for the upcoming audition. Maybe I can get some feedback from Elijah and Evelyn.

actions.dialog_text: Guys, let’s stick together and get out of here! Follow me!
actions.plan: Oh no, a gunshot! Everyone is panicking. I should follow the group and stay with them—safety in numbers!

actions.dialog_text: Sophia, let’s go! Stay close to me!
actions.plan: Sophia is here too! I should stay with her and follow her lead. We need to get out of here together!

actions.dialog_text: Let’s keep moving! We need to get out of here!
actions.plan: Frank said to stay calm and not move, but everyone else is moving. I should follow the group—they must know where to go!

memories.description: Decided to practice my monologue for the upcoming audition and asked Elijah and Evelyn for feedback.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the group to escape, prioritizing staying with others over evaluating the safest route.
Saw Sophia and decided to stay with her, continuing to follow the group’s lead to escape the building.
Ignored Frank’s advice to stay still and decided to follow the group moving toward hallway1, trusting their judgment over my own.
